name: AusQuest Limited
summary: AusQuest Limited explores and evaluates mineral resources in Australia and Peru. The company explores for copper, iron oxide, gold, zinc, silver, nickel, and base metal deposits. It holds approximately 7,400 square kilometers of exploration title within Australia, which includes 6,900 square kilometers in Western Australia and 500 square kilometers in Queensland. The company's portfolio of exploration projects includes Gunanya Gold-Copper project, Hamilton Copper project, Tangadee Zinc project, and Balladonia Nickel-Copper project located in Australia; and Cerro de Fierro Copper-Gold project, Parcoy IOCG project, and Los Otros project situated in Peru. It has a strategic alliance agreement with South32 Group Operations Pty Ltd. AusQuest Limited was incorporated in 2000 and is based in Ardross, Australia.
